title: Inventions Theme (german)
description: This mod adds a music disc for the Song 'Inventions'. This is the theme song of the project Inventions by HowToBeHayes on youtube.
body:
This mod adds a music disc for the Song 'Inventions'. This is the 
theme song of the project Inventions by HowToBeHayes on youtube.


It only adds a music disc of the song, which can be crafted with any 
music disc (excluding Pigstep and those from the Deep Dark biome), a 
diamond and a gold ingot.
The mod is suitable for "Create" modpacks. The song is in german language.

It also adds a cosmetic mask, that can be crafted with one inventions disc, a string and a wool. You can also craft it back

There is a 'secret' mob aswell.
